title: Flat Lay of Eco-Friendly Lifestyle Products on Natural Fiber Background
description: Square flat lay image featuring sustainable lifestyle items including a bamboo toothbrush, stainless steel water bottle, cloth shopping bag, and organic cotton produce bags containing fresh green limes, red onion, and leafy greens. The items are arranged neatly on a natural fiber backdrop with soft, warm natural lighting highlighting the textures of the natural materials.
